title: Drodi's Lapis Lazuli
description: Remakes the lapis lazuli item with a better shape and gold streaks
body:
I’m not a fan of how Lapis Lazuli looks—the shape feels off, and the texture isn’t much better (though the block itself is okay). That’s why I’ve updated it with an improved texture to make it look nicer.

The block itself may also get an update in the future.

<details>
<summary>OFFICIAL SOURCES</summary>


You can find the **official** versions of my packs on Modrinth under the profile [@Drodi](https://modrinth.com/user/Drodi) and on Planet Minecraft under the profile [Drodi](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/drodi/). Any other source may contain viruses or malware, so if you choose to download from other sites, please do so at your own risk.

If you suspect that someone is reuploading my resource packs elsewhere and action can be taken, please contact me on **Discord (drodi99)**.

</details>
